calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Sterling Jewelers, Inc.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Reymundo Valdez.
Witness, Ernest Tam, appearing for Plaintiff sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Kay Jewelers application
2-Terms and conditions of Kay Jewelers
3-Sales Slips
4-Transaction History
5-Billing statement dated 11/5/2014 and 12/5/2014
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Sterling Jewelers, Inc. and against Defendant Reymundo Valdez as follows:
Principal $2,629.04
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $350.00
Costs $339.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $3318.99

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Denied
